---
layout: default
title: "Parliament Deadlocked Over NEET Protests"
date: 2026-07-23T06:13:40.397173+00:00
summary: "Opposition protests over the NEET paper leak continue to disrupt Parliament, overshadowing legislative business and government attempts to initiate debate"
run_time_ist: "11:43AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 11:43AM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Parliamentary deadlock:</strong> The Monsoon Session faces repeated adjournments as the INDIA bloc demands the resignation of Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan over the NEET paper leak, rejecting government offers for a debate until their demands are met.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxOUmJCNnZRU3R6ang0cWhGbnZRN1FwSU5lNWZnSEJPVk9NTlZMbU5qTDFJS3hlNldQUlZSTERXaUwwSXRkVTBVZWVad04ydHIyak1wcngzMzRNRmpULUVWZ3R0b1liRTVELUZIbHBnVHl2WXZOX0hyYWNDN1lPOEZsY1VxdW5fcHcyY1pSQVRvdWM1SUtQdjRrdXJITHM4YzMtSnh0bg?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiugFBVV95cUxQSmExdVpibHBZV1k1R1d3MnZ4YUFMbzBaWVdqOVJ2OXdfenBJNWNid1gzLVp1Rzk5Ykx6OG94TWd1OEpZZ0NmdWxONFduRU00XzRrZ0hXYWcxeFlrWWlyY2wzbkxEQVZ2QlFwLVRmbFdBRk9Wd0UwZmJaS0JfOTR1UmROdWxhUFZqUHBwRTFua3RSZURzX1NuZWhIX2pNWk5WaFlMY29uckszRWQ1QXNTNVZ6d1F2Y0Vvemc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen"   <li><strong>Legislative agenda:</strong> Amidst the ongoing protests, the Lok Sabha is scheduled to take up the Supreme Court Judges Amendment Bill for debate.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiogFBVV95cUxNbjlKMmFPZ0wtRnlGU2tqemhNbG5IQUw1WlctdjFDTG52TkFBSDBySlR4bjNINWpaREZHVTJJS0RKaTBYTXpNVkkzNDFvcWNZWTdzTHoya1RjNmJtcEFwNXBhbHhHNWp6WmJRWmJ2cVdVZDNaYmFXR3laZHBDQ2NhUnE4NGQ5X0ZsSkh6cEhRTE9Fd0hOREt5MDVsWWpnREpnWmc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Privilege motion:</strong> Congress MP Hibi Eden has submitted a notice for a privilege motion against police action directed at Leader of Opposition Rahul Gandhi.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W7</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Political maneuvering:</strong> As the BJP conducts ground surveys in Telangana to bolster its electoral strategy, the party faces mounting pressure from opposition-led youth protests across the country.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiggFBVV95cUxPQmR5Ui1xREd6ZmVhdnhZU2RGVWh1ODJQS3RHOUZHRDdxMXdKUWdPcUtLYVBUOW9rZWtnbzZsMWZ1QzlLeXRldmtZNktMMWsxemRqamh2NlkwVGh3MjFrUHN6TGxLM1JiQkctb1RWcHpXQ0htR1Jtblh5WjZhWUR6MGRn?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W8</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W9</a></span></li>
</ul>
